title: MarkItDown sandbox execution (first real external repo use)
expected_output: A repo execution report capturing the clone HEAD, license/readme/pyproject detection, a static safety scan verdict, and the prepared (deferred) venv + --help command.
safety_rules: Clone only the allowlisted official URL into 21_repos/third_party_runtime_sandbox/markitdown.
Run only allowlisted git/metadata commands as argument lists with timeouts.
Static-scan the code before any execution; no shell-string subprocess and no PowerShell expression invocation.
No install into system Python; any venv stays under the sandbox venv root.
Do not commit cloned repo contents.
No containers, no package install, no remote script piping, no secrets.
